MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Marian Tam and Harald Hamster are present.
Attorney Joanna Kozubal appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Justin Hinds is present.
Attorney Joshua D.N. Hess representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-7-2011 is vacated.
